title: Implement AI provider classes
description: AnthropicProvider, OpenAIProvider, AzureOpenAIProvider, OpenRouterProvider. Shared callOpenAICompatible helper with authHeaders Record. Provider-specific optional settings added to Settings type. ESLint argsIgnorePattern for _ prefix.

title: Add StorageProvider interface and factory stub
description: StorageBackend type and storageBackend field in Settings. StorageProvider interface in src/shared/storage/types.ts. Factory createStorageProvider in src/shared/storage/index.ts with exhaustiveness check. Removes dataFilePath from Settings. Adds npm run check script.

title: Add AIProvider interface and factory stub
description: AIProvider interface in src/shared/providers/types.ts with id, name, suggestTags, and summarizePage. Factory function createProvider in src/shared/providers/index.ts with exhaustiveness check.

title: Add shared TypeScript types
description: AIProviderID union, Settings, Bookmark, and RootData interfaces in src/shared/types/index.ts. Updated ai-providers.md and data-model.md to include openrouter.

title: CI: lint, typecheck, build on push/PR
description: Add GitHub Actions workflow running ESLint, tsc --noEmit, and vite build. Required status check once passing on main.

title: Initial project scaffold: Vite + React + TypeScript + MV3 manifest
description: Set up the project skeleton: Vite build config, TypeScript, React, directory structure (src/background, src/sidebar, src/content, src/shared), and manifest.json for Manifest V3. No application logic — just the loadable extension shell.

title: Update brief and docs: storage abstraction and backend vision
description: Update project brief and docs/architecture.md to reflect StorageProvider abstraction (file + browser storage backends), OpenRouter as MVP provider, and planned backend service.

title: Set up docs/ folder with architecture, data model, and AI provider docs
description: Create docs/architecture.md (MV3 context model, message passing, service worker constraints, File System Access API flow), docs/data-model.md (full schema spec, field semantics, versioning/migration), and docs/ai-providers.md (provider interface contract, how to add a provider).

title: Add README
description: Project README covering what it is, how to build, how to load in Chrome, and project structure.
